Cape Coral FHA Loans

FHA loans in Cape Coral, Florida

Buy a home in Cape Coral with as little as 3.5% down. Here's how FHA loans work in Lee County, why Cape Coral's new-construction market is so FHA-friendly, and how to get pre-approved.

Cape Coral Home Loans

FHA loans in Cape Coral, Florida

Cape Coral is famous for its canals and one of the most active new-construction markets in Florida. For FHA buyers, that's a great combination: prices that largely sit within the FHA limit, and brand-new homes that meet FHA's property standards with ease. It's a popular landing spot for first-time buyers and relocating families using FHA's low 3.5% down.

Lee County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Cape Coral

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Cape Coral home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Cape Coral's affordable, new-construction-heavy market, that covers the vast majority of homes. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Lee County's exact figure with HUD.

FHA for Cape Coral's new-construction & waterfront market

New construction dominates Cape Coral, and new homes are ideal FHA candidates — they typically pass the appraisal cleanly and sit comfortably under the loan limit, perfect for first-time buyers. For older or canal-front homes that need updates (a new roof is common in Southwest Florida), an FHA 203(k) renovation loan can finance the repairs. Combine FHA with Florida assistance and gift funds to keep your cash to close low.

Down payment help for Cape Coral buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Cape Coral buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Lee County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Cape Coral

We help buyers throughout Cape Coral and Lee County, including SE Cape, SW Cape, Pelican, and the canal-front communities. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Cape Coral (Lee County) for 2026?+
Lee County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all Cape Coral homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Cape Coral good for FHA buyers?+
Very. Affordable prices and abundant new construction that meets FHA standards make it one of Southwest Florida's most FHA-friendly markets.
Does FHA work for Cape Coral new-construction homes?+
Yes — new homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily and sit well within the loan limit.
What about an older Cape Coral home that needs a new roof?+
An FHA 203(k) renovation loan can finance repairs like roofing along with the purchase — useful given Southwest Florida's roof considerations.
Do you serve Cape Coral and the rest of Lee County?+
Yes — Cape Coral, Fort Myers, Lehigh Acres, and surrounding communities.
